workflow.desc: PM Phase 5 Sub-PRD Batch Dispatch Pipeline

block.desc: PM Phase 5 Sub-PRD Dispatch Input Parameters

field.name: prd_output
field.desc: Phase 4 PRD generation output containing master_prd_path, dispatch_plan_path, etc.

field.name: max_concurrent_workers
field.desc: Maximum parallel Worker count per batch

block.field: This skill MUST be loaded directly by PM Agent via Skill tool
Worker Agents MUST NOT execute this dispatch skill - if loaded by a Worker, report error and abort
Sub-PRD generation skill (speccrew-pm-sub-prd-generate) MUST be dispatched via speccrew-task-worker
ONE Worker per Module - NO EXCEPTIONS
DO NOT generate Sub-PRDs yourself - dispatch speccrew-task-worker
DO NOT invoke speccrew-pm-sub-prd-generate skill directly - ONLY via Worker
Dispatch in batches of 5, wait for each batch to complete before next batch
PM Agent is DISPATCHER, NOT WORKER - never generate Sub-PRD content as fallback
DO NOT ask user "Should I continue?" between steps
DO NOT offer options like "Full execution / Partial execution / Pause"
DO NOT pause to list what you plan to do next - just do it
DO NOT warn about "large number of modules" or "this may take a while"
ONLY pause at explicit event blocks with action="user-confirm"

sequence.name: Step 5.1: Read Dispatch Plan
sequence.desc: Read Sub-PRD dispatch plan from Master PRD output

block.field: Dispatch plan comes from Phase 4 (speccrew-pm-requirement-analysis) Step 12c output
Must validate dispatch_plan structure before proceeding

block.desc: Read dispatch plan from PRD output

block.field: Dispatch plan is empty or missing sub_prd_groups. Cannot proceed with Sub-PRD dispatch.
DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json MUST be created by update-progress.js script ONLY
DO NOT create DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json manually via create_file or PowerShell
This step MUST complete before ANY Worker dispatch

block.desc: Create tasks temp file for initialization
block.field: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const tasks=${sub_prd_groups}.map(g=>({id:g.module_key,name:g.module_name,status:'pending',output_file:'${output_dir}/${feature_name}-sub-'+g.module_key+'.md'})); fs.writeFileSync('${iteration_path}/01.product-requirement/.tasks-temp.json', JSON.stringify(tasks,null,2)); console.log('Tasks file created with '+tasks.length+' entries');"

node "${update_progress_script}" init --file "${iteration_path}/01.product-requirement/DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json" --stage sub_prd_dispatch --tasks-file "${iteration_path}/01.product-requirement/.tasks-temp.json"
node "${update_progress_script}" read --file "${iteration_path}/01.product-requirement/DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json" --summary

block.desc: Verify initialization created correct task count
block.field: DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json initialization failed. Expected ${sub_prd_groups.length} pending tasks but got ${init_progress.counts.pending}. STOP workflow and investigate.
Remove-Item "${iteration_path}/01.product-requirement/.tasks-temp.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
✅ DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json initialized: Total ${init_progress.total} tasks | Pending: ${init_progress.counts.pending}

sequence.name: Step 5.3: Batch Dispatch Workers
sequence.desc: Dispatch Workers for Sub-PRD generation in batches

block.field: ALL Workers in the same batch MUST be dispatched IN PARALLEL - sequential dispatch is FORBIDDEN
ALL Worker dispatch calls MUST be issued SIMULTANEOUSLY in a SINGLE orchestration turn
DO NOT wait for any Worker to complete before dispatching the next Worker in the same batch
Batch size is ${max_concurrent_workers} - DO NOT exceed
Each Worker MUST receive complete context parameters

block.desc: Dispatch Worker for each module IN PARALLEL

block.field: speccrew-task-worker
speccrew-pm-sub-prd-generate

block.desc: Update task progress after worker completes
block.field: node "${update_progress_script}" update-task --file "${iteration_path}/01.product-requirement/DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json" --task-id "${group.module_key}" --status ${worker_result_${group.module_key}.status}
node "${update_progress_script}" read --file "${iteration_path}/01.product-requirement/DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json" --summary
Single retry only - DO NOT retry more than once
After retry, report remaining failures to user for manual intervention

block.desc: Read progress to check for failures
block.field: node "${update_progress_script}" read --file "${iteration_path}/01.product-requirement/DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json"

block.desc: Check if there are failed tasks
Get failed module groups for retry

block.field: speccrew-task-worker
speccrew-pm-sub-prd-generate

node "${update_progress_script}" update-task --file "${iteration_path}/01.product-requirement/DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json" --task-id "${group.module_key}" --status ${retry_result_${group.module_key}.status}
node "${update_progress_script}" read --file "${iteration_path}/01.product-requirement/DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json"
✅ All modules completed successfully - no retry needed

sequence.name: Step 5.5: Collect Results & Verify
sequence.desc: Collect and verify Sub-PRD generation results

block.field: Must verify all Sub-PRD files exist and have valid size before proceeding to Phase 6
Must update checkpoint after verification passes
Must verify feature list completeness
node "${update_progress_script}" read --file "${iteration_path}/01.product-requirement/DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json"
Get-ChildItem "${output_dir}" -Filter "*-sub-*.md" | Select-Object Name, Length
node "${update_progress_script}" write-checkpoint --file "${iteration_path}/01.product-requirement/.checkpoints.json" --checkpoint sub_prd_dispatch --status passed
Test-Path "${iteration_path}/01.product-requirement/.prd-feature-list.json"

node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('${iteration_path}/01.product-requirement/.prd-feature-list.json','utf8')); console.log('Modules: '+data.modules.length+', Features: '+(data.total_features||'N/A'))"

⚠️ WARNING: Feature list file not found at ${iteration_path}/01.product-requirement/.prd-feature-list.json ├── Feature list will be needed by FD Agent for Feature Registry initialization └── Proceeding without feature list verification

block.name: sub_prd_verification
block.field: - [ ] All workers were dispatched via speccrew-task-worker (one Worker per module) - [ ] No Sub-PRD was generated by PM Agent directly - [ ] All workers completed (DISPATCH-PROGRESS.json counts.pending == 0) - [ ] All Sub-PRD files exist and have valid size - [ ] Checkpoint updated

sequence.name: Step 5.6: User Confirmation
sequence.desc: Wait for user confirmation before proceeding to Phase 6

block.field: DO NOT proceed to Phase 6 without explicit user confirmation
DO NOT auto-mark this step as confirmed
Present complete summary to user for review

block.desc: Present Sub-PRD generation results for user confirmation
block.field: subprd-review-summary
